specific_question: According to post-training surveys, how valuable did the in-store employees find the August 2025 "Using the Database to Manage Customer Experience" training program?
answer: The post-training survey results show that 9 out of 10 in-store employees found the August 2025 "Using the Database to Manage Customer Experience" training program valuable.
